features: SUPER FRESH BREATH: A whole new dimension of freshness is waiting for you each time you brush with Colgate Max Fresh Toothpaste
LONGER COOLING: This fresh breath toothpaste has been infused with a brilliant burst of cooling crystals and FreshFX technology to give you 10X longer lasting cooling*
CAVITY FIGHTING: The fresh breath toothpaste not only freshens and cleans, it also helps to fight cavities
GLEAMING SMILE: This toothpaste for fresh breath also helps keep your teeth white *vs brushing with regular fluoride toothpaste
description: Product Description Colgate Max Fresh Toothpaste with Cooling Crystals is a new dimension in freshness with FreshFX technology to give you 10X longer lasting cooling than brushing with regular fluoride toothpaste. Directions Apply a small amount onto a toothbrush and brush teeth for two minutes, twice a day. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Not intended for ingestion. Box Contains 1 x Colgate Max Fresh with Cooling Crystals Toothpaste Pump 100ml, Pack of 6 Manufacturer Contact Information Guildford Business Park Guildford GU2 8XG See more
